_meta.note: Availability contract for the rmcp stdio adapter. system_discover remains callable when the daemon is unavailable and reports daemon availability for every tool. TB-1: on a host without a PTY runtime (non-unix; ConPTY pending) the four pty_* tools report available:false with the platform reason regardless of daemon reachability. This example was captured on such a host; on a unix host with the daemon up the pty_* tools report available:true.

response_example_daemon_unavailable.daemon_error: daemon ipc error [Internal]: daemon unavailable at startup

tools.name: system_discover
tools.description: Return adapter version, MCP spec, policy profile, tool catalogue.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Daemon liveness ping; returns uptime seconds.

tools.name: policy_status
tools.description: Active policy profile and bounded per-call caps.

tools.name: self_check
tools.description: Re-run the daemon self-check; bounded text report.

tools.name: command_start_combed
tools.description: Start a non-PTY argv command; bounded metadata response. No raw stdout/stderr.

tools.name: run_and_watch
tools.description: One-shot: start a command, wait (bounded) for its rule signals + exit, return both. Quiet command returns a receipt, not an error.

tools.name: command_status
tools.description: Lifecycle + counters lookup for a previously started job.

tools.name: command_output_tail
tools.description: Read the last N lines of a command's captured output WITHOUT a rule. For one-off/exploratory commands whose format you don't know (df -h, docker system df): start it, then read its tail here. Bounded: 200 lines / 64 KiB, truncation-flagged. For recurring signals, define a rule instead.

tools.name: bucket_events_since
tools.description: Cursor read of a bucket. Bounded; severity / kind filters supported.

tools.name: bucket_wait
tools.description: Realtime wait on a bucket. Heartbeat returned on timeout.

tools.name: bucket_summary
tools.description: Bucket counters + severity histogram. No raw stream content.

tools.name: event_context
tools.description: Bounded context window around an event. Pointer-based.

tools.name: registry_search
tools.description: FTS search over persisted rule definitions. Bounded.

tools.name: registry_get
tools.description: Fetch a rule definition by id and optional version.

tools.name: registry_upsert
tools.description: Insert a new immutable (rule_id, version+1) row from a JSON definition.

tools.name: registry_test
tools.description: Dry-run a rule against bounded samples; never persists, no raw stream lane.

tools.name: registry_activate
tools.description: Activate (rule_id, version?) for every newly-started command.

tools.name: registry_import_pack
tools.description: Import a curated rule pack by name; optionally activate it in one call.

tools.name: registry_deactivate
tools.description: Deactivate (rule_id, version); future commands skip the rule.

tools.name: registry_list_active
tools.description: Snapshot of every currently-active rule (id + version + severity).

tools.name: file_read_window
tools.description: Bounded line/byte window read of one file. Never returns the whole file.

tools.name: file_search
tools.description: Bounded substring search over one file. Returns structured match pointers + capped snippets.

tools.name: file_watch_start
tools.description: Start a daemon-owned file watch bound to a bucket; emits signal only when scoped rules match.

tools.name: file_watch_stop
tools.description: Stop a previously started file watch by watch_id.

tools.name: file_watch_list
tools.description: Snapshot of every currently-live file watch.

tools.name: pty_command_start
tools.description: Start an interactive non-shell argv command attached to a PTY. Bounded metadata only.
tools.unavailable_reason: PTY runtime unavailable on this platform (ConPTY pending)

tools.name: pty_command_write_stdin
tools.description: Write bounded stdin bytes to a running PTY job. Denied while a secret prompt is active.
tools.unavailable_reason: PTY runtime unavailable on this platform (ConPTY pending)

tools.name: pty_command_stop
tools.description: Stop a previously started PTY job by job_id. Returns final counters.
tools.unavailable_reason: PTY runtime unavailable on this platform (ConPTY pending)

tools.name: pty_command_list
tools.description: Snapshot of every currently-live PTY job (including secret_prompt_active).
tools.unavailable_reason: PTY runtime unavailable on this platform (ConPTY pending)

tools.name: runtime_state
tools.description: Bounded aggregate runtime snapshot: probes, buckets, active rule scopes.

tools.name: probe_list
tools.description: Flat list of every live probe across all runtimes (command / pty / file watch).

tools.name: probe_status
tools.description: Bounded per-probe lookup by probe_id. Returns UnknownProbe if not live.

availability_invariants.pty_unavailable_reason_when_no_runtime: PTY runtime unavailable on this platform (ConPTY pending)
